_comment: Risk thresholds used by risk_scorer.py to calibrate the AI's judgment. Editable without touching code. adjust_thresholds.py can update this file automatically based on real outcomes logged in the audit trail -- this is what makes 'adjust risk thresholds dynamically based on pipeline performance' (from the brief) a real, runnable mechanism rather than a static prompt.
last_adjusted_reason: Low-risk deployments failed 25% of the time (n=12, target <5%) -- tightened Low bar: min coverage 80%->85%, max files 20->15
